title: Diploma in Office Automation & Publishing

title: ZBrush 3D Sculpting
shortDescription: Learn professional 3D digital sculpting for films, games, and collectibles in this 4-month ZBrush course.
fullDescription: Master ZBrush — the industry-standard tool for 3D sculpting used in films, games, and product design. metaDescription: Learn ZBrush 3D sculpting for films, games & collectibles. Master organic sculpting, retopology, Polypaint & rendering. Build a professional character artist portfolio.
